nasb.text: When he fills his belly, God will send His fierce anger on him And will rain it on him while he is eating.

esv.text: To fill his belly to the full, God will send his burning anger against him and rain it upon him into his body.

cnv.text: 他正在填飽肚腹的時候， 　神就把猛烈的怒氣降在他身上， 他正在吃飯的時候， 　神要把這怒氣如雨降在他身上。

ccb.text: 上帝的怒火如雨降在他身上， 填满他的肚腹。
